metadata.notes: Do not reference the third-party visibility provider by brand name in public case-study copy.

key_callouts.title: Baseline strength
key_callouts.value: 297 sessions, 203 engaged sessions, 68.35% engagement rate, 14 lead actions
key_callouts.recommended_annotation: Baseline month with strong organic engagement

key_callouts.title: Paid-heavy month, organic still converted
key_callouts.value: 348 sessions, 238 engaged sessions, 8 appointment requests, 17 calls, 8.91% key event rate
key_callouts.recommended_annotation: Organic lead activity remained strong during a paid-search-heavy month

key_callouts.title: Strong organic lead month
key_callouts.value: 402 sessions, 264 engaged sessions, 8 appointment requests, 20 calls, 7.46% key event rate
key_callouts.recommended_annotation: One of the strongest organic lead-action months

key_callouts.title: Organic became top channel
key_callouts.value: 369 sessions, 228 engaged sessions, 4 appointment requests, 26 calls, 8.67% key event rate
key_callouts.recommended_annotation: Organic Search became the top channel by sessions

key_callouts.title: Best conversion efficiency
key_callouts.value: 303 sessions, 204 engaged sessions, 5 appointment requests, 13 calls, 11.22% key event rate
key_callouts.recommended_annotation: Best organic session key event rate in available data

chart_config.interaction: No chart; animated KPI cards with data source from ga4_period_summary
Metric toggles for sessions, engaged sessions, appointment requests, click to call, combined lead actions, engagement rate, key event rate

chart_config.primary_metric: estimated organic traffic, organic keywords, traffic value
chart_config.interaction: Metric tabs using visibility_monthly and visibility_benchmarks
Toggle sessions, engaged sessions, lead actions; stacked bars or area chart

chart_config.primary_metric: engagement rate, average engagement time, session key event rate
chart_config.interaction: Compare Organic Search, Paid Search, Direct with timeframe selector
Sortable, searchable table with year/month filters and export
